in_scope_notes: Southern Vancouver Island native plants, seeds, blends, propagation, supplier availability, and cultivation notes.
exclusion_notes: Do not use as sole authority for native status, ecological scores, pollinator scores, or final planting recommendations.
scrape_policy: Planned P16 adapter must use polite fetches, preserve raw material only in ignored locations, and normalize observations into provider sandbox tables.
notes: Already appears as species-level source rows in the Vancouver PoC; P15 records it as a provider.

in_scope_notes: Pacific Northwest native meadow and lawn-replacement seed material that may suggest candidate species and mowability context.
exclusion_notes: Rows require Vancouver/BC suitability review before eligibility; do not import US PNW species directly as Vancouver-suitable facts.
scrape_policy: Planned P16 adapter must flag rows as needs_northward_review unless independent Vancouver/BC suitability evidence is supplied.
notes: Provider is useful for candidate context but requires geographic filtering.

in_scope_notes: Native wildflower, regional wildflower, and lawn-compatible seed material relevant to Vancouver review.
exclusion_notes: Exclude vegetables and non-native wildflower mix components unless explicitly approved through review.
scrape_policy: Planned P16 adapter must exclude vegetable categories and route mix components through Vancouver eligibility review.
notes: Provider has broad catalogue content; only native/wildflower/lawn-compatible material is in scope.

in_scope_notes: BC seed supplier information, native grasses and forbs, reclamation seed, wildflower seed, and lawn/turf context.
exclusion_notes: Do not use as sole authority for native status, ecological scores, pollinator scores, or final planting recommendations.
scrape_policy: Planned P16 adapter must preserve product/category provenance and normalize supplier availability separately from plant identity.
notes: Provider is useful for BC supplier and seed-product context.
